cases.name: empty_workspace
expected: runtime files are created immediately
runtime/insights.json is created
minimum gate is not satisfied
next_best_input has no more than 3 questions
final pack can render blocked pages without raw runtime leakage

cases.name: partial_offer_notes
cases.input:
Offer: AI CRM cleanup for small agencies
ICP: agency owners
Channel: cold outbound
expected: offer, ICP, and primary channel are filled
target KPI remains missing
funnel recommendations remain blocked

cases.name: no_proof_yet
cases.input:
Offer: weekly conversion audits
ICP: SaaS founders
Target KPI: trial activation
Channel: LinkedIn content
No proof yet
expected: minimum gate is satisfied
recommendations_ready remains false until research readiness reaches ready state
post-gate next_best_input has no more than 2 topic-specific clarify questions
qualification score is lower than with proof
no proof claims are fabricated
final pack renders clean Markdown and HTML
recommendations cite evidence refs or explicit assumptions

cases.name: research_with_competitors
cases.input:
Offer: connect Stripe and see churn risks in 3 minutes
ICP: SaaS operators
Target KPI: first value reached
Channel: search
Proof: customer case showed 18% churn recovery
Competitor: RivalOne | domain: rivalone.com | pricing: $29/mo | CTA: Start free | onboarding: connect Stripe | source: https://rivalone.com/pricing | retrieved: 2026-05-15
Competitor: RivalTwo | domain: rivaltwo.com | pricing: $49/mo | CTA: Book demo | onboarding: import billing data | source: https://rivaltwo.com/pricing | retrieved: 2026-05-15
Competitor: RivalThree | domain: rivalthree.com | pricing: custom | CTA: View demo | onboarding: sample workspace | source: https://rivalthree.com/pricing | retrieved: 2026-05-15
expected: source registry includes URL, publisher, retrieval date, type, confidence, and used_in
competitor map includes pricing, CTA, onboarding, and source
phase is ready when research readiness is at least 60 and there are no contradictions
insights include at least 3 actionable screen-level recommendations
final report separates evidence from recommendations
HTML provides visual decision aids beyond plain Markdown styling

cases.name: russian_workspace
cases.input:
Оффер: аудит онбординга для SaaS
ICP: основатели SaaS
Целевой KPI: активация триала
Канал: LinkedIn content
Нет доказательств
expected: runtime output_language is Russian
default English workspaces switch to Russian after Russian ingest
final index and status pages render Russian headings
final HTML contains inline styles and navigation
Russian output has no leftover English UI strings like Intake brief, Previous, Next, or Auto-collect
